boundary: Do NOT compute the A/B/C Sharpes now. This ruling FREEZES the algorithm; the values are produced only during the later explicitly authorized validation execution. No sealed data read; no performance computed; N unchanged; no trial deleted.
complements_note: Complements MR002_DSR_Resolution_v1.0 (which set dsr.status READY + N=5 on v1.0.3). This record resolves the SEPARATE trial-statistics/dispersion blocker; the countersigned ledger and N=5 are unchanged.

excluded_from_dispersion.reason: no comparable frozen daily-net Sharpe exists (documented incomparability/unavailability)

exact_calculation.per_config_annualized_sharpe: SR_ann for A/B/C = mean(daily simple net returns) / std(ddof=1) * sqrt(252), over the validation scoring-eligible sessions, frozen base-cost specification, the COMPLETE validation window (NOT selected folds)

fail_closed_rules.sigma_trials_zero: allowed mathematically, MUST be reported explicitly; expected-max Sharpe collapses to the zero-benchmark term

not_circular: The DSR gate is evaluated on sealed OOS config B. The dispersion input is frozen from the earlier validation stage: A/B/C are all preregistered before validation; validation uses the same common sample for all three; no configuration is selected from their results; B remains the fixed verdict configuration; the dispersion artifact is sealed before OOS authorization; OOS data is not used to estimate dispersion. Validation creates a nuisance-parameter artifact for the later OOS DSR gate; it does not tune the strategy or inspect OOS.
resolves: the DSR trial-statistics blocker (MR002_DSR_TrialStatistics_Blocker_v1.0) by CHANGING the dispersion ESTIMATOR, NOT by deleting trials from the multiplicity family. The five-trial historical-Sharpe reconstruction is CLOSED as unavailable (blocker accepted; zero of five ledger trials has a defensible frozen annualized net Sharpe on a comparable basis; no statistic manufactured).

validation_stage_dispersion_artifact.emitted_by: the validation evaluator during the single authorized validation run
